headline: **MLB Daily Recap: April 30, 2026**
article:
The Tampa Bay Rays fell to the Cleveland Guardians in a 1-3 decision, despite a strong outing from Gavin Williams. Williams earned the win with 7.2 innings of shutout ball, striking out nine and allowing just five hits.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Luis Robert Jr. of the New York Mets, who has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a lumbar spine disc herniation. Other injured players include Brandon Williamson of the Cincinnati Reds, Javier Báez of the Detroit Tigers, Casey Mize of the Detroit Tigers, Angel Zerpa of the Milwaukee Brewers, Jared Oliva of the San Francisco Giants, Garrett Crochet of the Boston Red Sox, and Everson Pereira of the Chicago White Sox.

The Los Angeles Dodgers made a trade, acquiring 2B Tyler Fitzgerald from the Toronto Blue Jays in exchange for cash. The Seattle Mariners also made a trade, sending RHP Casey Legumina to the Tampa Bay Rays in exchange for RHP Ty Cummings.

top_news.title: **Rays Fall Short in Cleveland**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays dropped a 1-3 decision to the Cleveland Guardians, unable to overcome a strong outing from Gavin Williams. Williams earned the win with 7.2 innings of shutout ball, striking out nine and allowing just five hits.

top_news.title: **Angels Fall Short in Chicago**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Angels dropped a 2-3 decision to the Chicago White Sox, unable to overcome a late rally. Mike Trout led the Angels' offense with a home run and an RBI, while Erick Fedde pitched 7 strong innings with 6 strikeouts.

top_news.title: **Mariners Take Down Twins in Thrilling 5-3 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Seattle Mariners secured a hard-fought 5-3 win over the Minnesota Twins, with Cooper Criswell earning the win and Andrés Muñoz securing the save.

top_news.title: **Yankees Fall to Rangers in Shutout**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees suffered a 0-3 loss to the Texas Rangers, with Nathan Eovaldi earning the win after pitching 7.0 innings with 7 strikeouts and 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Mets Place Luis Robert Jr. on 10-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: Luis Robert Jr., the center fielder for the New York Mets, has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a lumbar spine disc herniation. The move is retroactive to April 27, 2026.

top_news.title: **Dodgers Acquire Tyler Fitzgerald in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Los Angeles Dodgers have acquired 2B Tyler Fitzgerald from the Toronto Blue Jays in exchange for cash.
